series_metadata.series_title: FUNERAL DIRECTOR'S LICENSE APPLICATION HISTORY FILE
series_metadata.series_description: This file contains: 1) Funeral Director's application for registration [Form F-1]; 2) Funeral Director's certificate of registration [Form F-2]; 3) Funeral Director's certificate of beginning of apprenticeship [Form F-3]; 4) Funeral Director's apprenticeship card [Form F-4]; 5) Funeral Director's termination of apprenticeship [Form F-5]; 6) Certification of Funeral Directing [Form f-6]; 7) Application for funeral directors license [Form F-7]; 8) Examination Grade; 9) Copies of official correspondence from the Board of Embalmers and Funeral Directors notifying licensee of his failure to renew license and other formal actions of the Board; 10) Registered mail receipts on official correspondence sent to licensee. The above state files are maintained to insure that all licensed funeral director's have adequately qualified for a Funeral Director's License.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until death of licensee or revocation of license by Board of Embalmers and Funeral Directors., Paper: Wastepaper
